channel.title: Books on Bush Digital Guides
channel.description: Recent content in Books on Bush Digital Guides

item.title: AI for Tradies
item.description:
What’s Inside

AI cannot replace licensed, physical trade work. It can, however, be considered for some of the admin around that work.

This book gives Australian tradies — sparkies, plumbers, chippies, painters, landscapers — a plain-language way to assess AI tools for common business tasks. It covers practical options, their limits, and where human review remains necessary.

Who It’s For

  • Solo tradies reviewing their admin processes
  • Trade business owners with staff and shared systems
  • Apprentices learning how digital admin tools are configured
  • Any tradie who’s curious about AI but doesn’t know where to start

What You’ll Learn

Part 1 — AI for Tradies (No BS): What AI actually is (in plain English), what it can and can’t do for trade businesses, and five areas where it may be useful.

item.title: Automate Everything
item.description:
What’s Inside

Small-business admin can include invoice reminders, quote follow-ups, scheduling, record keeping, and repeated customer messages.

This book focuses on practical tools and processes that Australian small businesses can assess and introduce at a manageable pace.

Who It’s For

  • Tradies running solo or with a small crew
  • Consultants stuck in feast-or-famine cycles
  • Small business owners mapping recurring admin processes
  • Anyone assessing where software connections and approval steps belong

What You’ll Learn

Part 1 — The Mindset: Where your time actually goes (not where you think it goes), the automation stack explained in plain English, and how to audit your time leaks.
